1.description: get Lillestrøm kommunenummer and bounding box

2.description: get quick-clay polygons intersecting Lillestrøm bbox

4.description: get 1km grid cells intersecting Lillestrøm bbox

5.description: assign parcels to grid cells (one row per parcel with grid id)

6.description: filter parcel-grid rows to those within quick-clay polygons

8.description: sort grid cells by parcel count desc

args.sql:
SELECT objid, kommunenummer, kommunenavn,
  ST_XMin(omrade) AS xmin,
  ST_XMax(omrade) AS xmax,
  ST_YMin(omrade) AS ymin,
  ST_YMax(omrade) AS ymax
FROM kommuner_627ee106072240e99d2b21ec4717bf01.kommune
WHERE kommunenavn ILIKE '%Lillestrøm%';

final_sql:
-- STEP 1: query [kommuner]
SELECT objid, kommunenummer, kommunenavn,
  ST_XMin(omrade) AS xmin,
  ST_XMax(omrade) AS xmax,
  ST_YMin(omrade) AS ymin,
  ST_YMax(omrade) AS ymax
FROM kommuner_627ee106072240e99d2b21ec4717bf01.kommune
WHERE kommunenavn ILIKE '%Lillestrøm%';

-- STEP BOUNDARY --

-- STEP 2: query [kvikkleire]
SELECT kartleggingsomradeid, kartleggingsomradenavn, omrade
FROM kvikkleire_175185730654415d8841436d0d6999f2.kartleggingsomrade
WHERE ST_Intersects(omrade, ST_MakeEnvelope(273111.449998925,6629675.919999996,301398.5999995858,6665930.429999998,25833));

-- STEP BOUNDARY --

-- STEP 3: query [matrikkeleneiendomskartteig]
SELECT teigid, matrikkelnummertekst, kommunenummer, representasjonspunkt
FROM matrikkeleneiendomskartteig_36313fab8faa42d99cb779d86d1ca26d.teig
WHERE kommunenummer = '3205';

-- STEP BOUNDARY --

-- STEP 4: query [statistiskrutenett1km]
SELECT id, ssbid1000m, geom
FROM public.statistiskrutenett1km
WHERE ST_Intersects(geom, ST_MakeEnvelope(273111.449998925,6629675.919999996,301398.5999995858,6665930.429999998,25833));

-- STEP BOUNDARY --

-- STEP 5: spatial_join
-- left_source: 3
-- right_source: 4
-- join_type: "intersects"
-- left_geom: "representasjonspunkt"
-- right_geom: "geom"

-- STEP BOUNDARY --

-- STEP 6: spatial_join
-- left_source: 5
-- right_source: 2
-- join_type: "intersects"
-- left_geom: "representasjonspunkt"
-- right_geom: "omrade"

-- STEP BOUNDARY --

-- STEP 7: aggregate
-- source_step: 6
-- aggregation_type: "count"
-- group_by: ["ssbid1000m"]
-- metric_as: "parcel_count"

-- STEP BOUNDARY --

-- STEP 8: sort
-- source_step: 7
-- order_by: "parcel_count"
-- order_direction: "desc"

-- STEP BOUNDARY --

-- STEP 9: limit
-- source_step: 8
-- limit: 5
